title: Social Media Coordinator
description: JLL, the global real estate services leader, seeks a Social Media Coordinator to build and manage our brand presence. Working fully remote, you'll create content, manage social platforms, and engage with audiences. This role combines creativity with data-driven strategy in a B2B real estate context.
responsibilities: Create and publish social media content across multiple platforms
Develop social media calendars and campaign strategies
Engage with followers and respond to inquiries professionally
Monitor social metrics and analyze content performance
Collaborate with marketing and business teams on campaigns
Stay current with social media trends and platform updates

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
skills: Social media management and content creation
Understanding of social media platforms (LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram)
Basic graphic design or visual communication
Attention to brand voice and tone
